\tzpentry{ID4663}{Lemniscate Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4663 introduces Lemniscate Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$V(\\phi) = \\frac{\\lambda}{4}(\\phi^2 - v^2)^2 + V_{\\text{lemniscate}}[r, \\theta] + \\sum_{n=1}^{153,600} \\delta(r - r_n) \\cdot \\Phi_{\\text{nodal}}", "latex_normalized": "$
\]
